================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 47 EC 8A 45 2F
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1830
Reflected CC   : 0x0A
RetType        : 0x04
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 2

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1830
ReflectedCC  : 0x0A
PayloadLen   : 2

[UNKNOWN MID] No parser for ReflectedMID=0x1830

[PAYLOAD HEX]
02 00 

[RETURN VALUE]
02 00 

[BINARY DATA]
